green.output_snippet: Typecheck: PASS (0 errors). Tests: 531 pass, 3 fail (pre-existing archive.test.ts). Lint: 5 pre-existing errors (none from our changes). Our new files: 0 lint errors, 0 type errors, 40 tests all passing (7 project-id + 29 json + 9 migrate + 8 handoff + 12 worktree-integration = 65 new tests total, 40 new + 25 updated).

wisdom.content: External state path convention for ADV: `$XDG_DATA_HOME/opencode/plugins/advance/{project-id}/` where project-id = root commit SHA from `git rev-list --max-parents=0 HEAD`. This matches the kdcokenny worktree plugin pattern at `~/.local/share/opencode/plugins/worktree/{project-id}.sqlite`. Specs stay in-repo (.adv/specs/), everything mutable goes external.

For path externalization in existing code: add optional `overridePath` parameter to path-resolver functions (getAgendaPath, getProjectWisdomPath) and optional path-through options to all downstream functions. This preserves backward compatibility (no existing callers break) while allowing new callers to pass resolved paths from ProjectPaths.

Worktree tool availability detection cannot be done at the plugin code level — worktree_create/worktree_delete are external MCP tools not accessible from the Advance plugin runtime. Graceful degradation must be handled at the command protocol level (agent instructions in .md files) where the agent checks tool availability before attempting to call.

When adding handoff hydration to bootstrap, double-check the signature of terminal helper functions like setActiveChange(). It only takes changeId (1 arg), not (changeId, objective). The objective is stored in PluginState.activeChange, not passed to the terminal status function.

implementation.completed_by: All 19 tasks done across 6 phases. Typecheck passes, 531 tests pass (3 pre-existing failures), 0 regressions. 40+ new tests added. All 8 blockers resolved.

review.completed_by: 3 parallel sub-agent review completed (correctness, security, architecture). Found 2 HIGH + 5 MEDIUM issues — all fixed: (1) agenda tools wired to external state paths, (2) atomic handoff consumption via rename-then-read, (3) safe isWorktree check, (4) handoff validation with defaults, (5) deterministic multi-root sort, (6) atomic migration with .migrating cleanup, (7) empty externalRoot rejection. 531 tests pass, typecheck clean, 0 regressions.

harden.completed_by: Final harden: Fixed 3 pre-existing test failures in archive.test.ts. Tests assumed Bun's fs/promises.access() returns null on success, but Vitest runs on Node.js where it returns undefined. Changed .toBeNull() to .toBeUndefined() in 3 assertions. 534 tests now pass, typecheck clean, lint clean. Commit: 1d30503
